# Aleksandr Teymurazov

> Engineering leader building trusted CI/CD, Quality Intelligence, AI-driven validation, and delivery observability for enterprise software organizations.

Personal site of Aleksandr Teymurazov — operating principles, work experience, accomplishments, and the AT Quality Intelligence (ATQI) framework. Long-form articles live on the companion site at https://atqi.dev.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, hero, principles, accomplishments, experience, framework, insights, education, and contact.
- [Insights](/insights): Perspectives on quality engineering, M&A technical integration, and AI in engineering, with the latest long-form articles from https://atqi.dev.

## Related sites

- [atqi.dev](https://atqi.dev): ATQI Insights — articles on the ATQI framework, CI/CD trust, AI-assisted validation, and software quality engineering, authored by Aleksandr Teymurazov.
